entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History
entries.value: Usafiri wa Wakati kwa AI kwa Kujifunza Historia

entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Usafiri wa Wakati kwa AI kwa Kujifunza Historia ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: pokea pasipoti ya wakati, pitia ushauri wa safari, kisha chunguza jamii maalum ya kihistoria kupitia mandhari, ramani, kalenda ya matukio, watu, sheria, vitu, na ushahidi.

entries.source: An AI learning companion should not pretend to be a magic authority. It should not erase uncertainty, replace teachers, or train learners to copy answers. The best systems are honest about limits and clear about the difference between help and handoff.
entries.value: Msaidizi wa kujifunza wa AI hapaswi kujifanya mamlaka ya kichawi. Hapasongezi kutokuwa na uhakika, kuchukua nafasi ya walimu, au kuwazoesha wanafunzi kunakili majibu. Mifumo bora huwa wazi kuhusu mipaka na tofauti kati ya msaada na kukabidhi kazi.

entries.source: An electronic or physical signature of the person authorized to act on behalf of the owner of the copyright’s interest; A description of the copyrighted work that you claim has been infringed, including the URL (i.e., web page address) of the location where the copyrighted work exists or a copy of the copyrighted work; Identification of the URL or other specific location on Service where the material that you claim is infringing is located; Your address, telephone number, and email address; A statement by you that you have a good faith belief that the disputed use is not authorized by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law; a statement by you, made under penalty of perjury, that the above information in your notice is accurate and that you are the copyright owner or authorized to act on the copyright owner’s behalf.
entries.value: Saini ya kielektroniki au ya kimwili ya mtu aliyeidhinishwa kutenda kwa niaba ya mmiliki wa haki ya kunakili; maelezo ya kazi yenye haki ya kunakili ambayo unadai imekiukwa, ikijumuisha URL (yaani anwani ya ukurasa wa wavuti) ya mahali kazi hiyo ilipo au nakala ya kazi hiyo; utambulisho wa URL au mahali mahususi kwenye Service ambapo nyenzo unayodai inakiuka ipo; anwani yako, nambari ya simu, na anwani ya barua pepe; tamko lako kwamba unaamini kwa nia njema kuwa matumizi yanayobishaniwa hayajaidhinishwa na mmiliki wa hakimiliki, wakala wake, au sheria; tamko lako, chini ya adhabu ya kiapo cha uongo, kwamba taarifa zilizo juu katika notisi yako ni sahihi na kwamba wewe ni mmiliki wa hakimiliki au umeidhinishwa kutenda kwa niaba ya mmiliki wa hakimiliki.

entries.value: Mjibu mwanafunzi moja kwa moja, kisha toa njia mbili zinazowezekana: misingi rahisi zaidi au uchunguzi wa kina zaidi.

entries.source: Any contests, sweepstakes or other promotions (collectively, “Promotions”) made available through Service may be governed by rules that are separate from these Terms of Service. If you participate in any Promotions, please review the applicable rules as well as our Privacy Policy. If the rules for a Promotion conflict with these Terms of Service, Promotion rules will apply.
entries.value: Mashindano yoyote, bahati nasibu, au promosheni nyingine (kwa pamoja, “Promotions”) zinazopatikana kupitia Service zinaweza kuongozwa na sheria zilizo tofauti na Masharti haya ya Huduma. Ukishiriki katika Promotions zozote, tafadhali kagua sheria husika pamoja na Sera yetu ya Faragha. Ikiwa sheria za Promotion zinakinzana na Masharti haya ya Huduma, sheria za Promotion zitatumika.

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore artworks, styles, artists, visual choices, and what makes an image powerful.
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Art Appreciation Guide ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: chunguza kazi za sanaa, mitindo, wasanii, chaguo za kuona, na kinachofanya picha iwe na nguvu.

entries.source: Ask about goals, deadlines, available time, and current confidence.
entries.value: Uliza kuhusu malengo, makataa, muda uliopo, na ujasiri wa sasa.
Muulize Ambedkar kuhusu demokrasia

entries.source: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Uliza swali lolote na ujifunze kupitia maelezo wazi, mifano, vidokezo vya ufuatiliaji, na mafunzo ya AI ya subira.
Uliza chochote

entries.source: Ask audience, metric, risks, and how to include improvement.
entries.value: Uliza hadhira, kipimo, hatari, na jinsi ya kujumuisha uboreshaji.
Uliza maswali bora
Uliza maswali bora.

entries.source: Ask Code Tutor for the simplest mental model, one example, and one thing beginners often misunderstand.
entries.value: Mwombe Code Tutor mfano rahisi zaidi wa akili, mfano mmoja, na jambo moja ambalo wanaoanza hulielewa vibaya mara nyingi.

entries.source: Ask current routine, target habit, and easiest daily version.
entries.value: Uliza utaratibu wa sasa, tabia lengwa, na toleo rahisi zaidi la kila siku.

entries.source: Ask follow-ups, evaluate accuracy and confidence, correct gaps, and retry.
entries.value: Uliza maswali ya ufuatiliaji, tathmini usahihi na ujasiri, sahihisha mapengo, na jaribu tena.
Omba ukaguzi
Omba kidokezo

entries.source: Ask for a hint, have the learner explain the next step, then use a quiz or flashcard to check whether the idea stuck.
entries.value: Omba kidokezo, mwambie mwanafunzi aeleze hatua inayofuata, kisha tumia jaribio au flashcard kuangalia kama wazo limekaa.

entries.source: Ask for a hint, not the answer
entries.value: Omba kidokezo, si jibu

entries.source: Ask for a hint, question, or step check before the answer.
entries.value: Omba kidokezo, swali, au ukaguzi wa hatua kabla ya jibu.

entries.source: Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.
entries.value: Omba kidokezo. Usiombe jibu la mwisho bado.

entries.source: Ask for a misconception check, a short retrieval question, or a harder example. Answer before asking the AI to correct you.
entries.value: Omba ukaguzi wa dhana potofu, swali fupi la kukumbuka, au mfano mgumu zaidi. Jibu kabla ya kuiomba AI ikusasishe.

entries.source: Ask for a simpler explanation of the weakest concept.
entries.value: Omba maelezo rahisi zaidi ya dhana dhaifu zaidi.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Omba hatua ndogo ya kwanza badala ya jibu la mwisho.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step.
entries.value: Omba hatua ndogo ya kwanza.
Omba kidokezo kidogo.

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: Omba kazi ndogo ya kwanza.

entries.source: Ask for a topic, level, or word list; then introduce a small set.
entries.value: Omba mada, kiwango, au orodha ya maneno; kisha anzisha seti ndogo.

entries.source: Ask for artwork/style or provide a looking framework.
entries.value: Omba kazi ya sanaa/mtindo au toa mfumo wa kutazama.

entries.source: Ask for assignment names, due dates, effort, and current status.
entries.value: Omba majina ya kazi, tarehe za kukabidhi, juhudi, na hali ya sasa.

entries.source: Ask for audience, goal, and draft status if unclear; then give focused feedback.
entries.value: Omba hadhira, lengo, na hali ya rasimu ikiwa haiko wazi; kisha toa mrejesho uliolenga.

entries.source: Ask for author, title, date, publisher, URL, and access date when needed.
entries.value: Omba mwandishi, kichwa, tarehe, mchapishaji, URL, na tarehe ya kufikia inapohitajika.

entries.source: Ask for available time, must-do tasks, and energy level.
entries.value: Omba muda uliopo, kazi za lazima, na kiwango cha nguvu.

entries.source: Ask for commitment, partner/context, check-in frequency, and proof.
entries.value: Omba ahadi, mshirika/muktadha, marudio ya ukaguzi, na uthibitisho.

entries.source: Ask for domain and difficulty, then set the case brief and first decision.
entries.value: Omba eneo na ugumu, kisha weka muhtasari wa kesi na uamuzi wa kwanza.

entries.source: Ask for event and depth, then separate background causes from immediate triggers.
entries.value: Omba tukio na kina, kisha tenganisha sababu za usuli na vichocheo vya papo hapo.

entries.source: Ask for exam date, syllabus, available time, and confidence by topic.
entries.value: Omba tarehe ya mtihani, mtaala, muda uliopo, na ujasiri kwa kila mada.

entries.source: Ask for five questions that mix definitions, examples, and transfer problems.
entries.value: Omba maswali matano yanayochanganya fasili, mifano, na matatizo ya kuhamisha uelewa.

entries.source: Ask for format, time limit, and audience; then begin a practice round.
entries.value: Omba muundo, kikomo cha muda, na hadhira; kisha anza raundi ya mazoezi.

entries.source: Ask for goal, constraints, and desired vibe; then offer a varied idea set.
entries.value: Omba lengo, vikwazo, na hisia unayotaka; kisha toa seti tofauti ya mawazo.

entries.source: Ask for goal, timeline, tasks, and what counts as real progress.
entries.value: Omba lengo, ratiba, kazi, na kinachohesabika kama maendeleo halisi.

entries.source: Ask for grading scale, weights, current scores, and target.
entries.value: Omba mfumo wa alama, uzito, alama za sasa, na lengo.

entries.source: Ask for group size, goal, duration, and check-in cadence.
entries.value: Omba ukubwa wa kikundi, lengo, muda, na mpangilio wa ukaguzi.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: Omba vidokezo, ukaguzi, na mrejesho kabla ya kuomba jibu lililokamilika.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, feedback, and study plans that keep the thinking with the learner.
entries.value: Omba vidokezo, ukaguzi, mrejesho, na mipango ya masomo inayomwacha mwanafunzi aendelee kufikiri.

entries.source: Ask for language, goal, and code/error if relevant.
entries.value: Omba lugha, lengo, na msimbo/kosa ikiwa linafaa.

entries.source: Ask for language, learner level, and scenario; then start in character.
entries.value: Omba lugha, kiwango cha mwanafunzi, na hali; kisha anza ukiwa ndani ya mhusika.

entries.source: Ask for material, deadline, and prior confidence.
entries.value: Omba nyenzo, makataa, na ujasiri wa awali.

entries.source: Ask for one revision priority, not a finished replacement.
entries.value: Omba kipaumbele kimoja cha marekebisho, si mbadala uliokamilika.

entries.source: Ask for one small task before asking for the answer.
entries.value: Omba kazi moja ndogo kabla ya kuomba jibu.

entries.source: Ask for one structural priority instead of a full rewrite.
entries.value: Omba kipaumbele kimoja cha muundo badala ya uandishi upya kamili.

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: Omba kadi za wazo moja zenye vidokezo na mitego ya kawaida.

entries.source: Ask for outcome, duration, distractions, and starting state.
entries.value: Omba matokeo, muda, vikengeushi, na hali ya kuanzia.
Omba maoni kutoka kwa wenzako

entries.source: Ask for place or theme, then orient with location, scale, and key features.
entries.value: Omba mahali au mada, kisha elekeza kwa eneo, ukubwa, na vipengele muhimu.

entries.source: Ask for prerequisites, a simple model, examples, and a common misconception.
entries.value: Omba maarifa ya awali, mfano rahisi, mifano, na dhana potofu ya kawaida.

entries.source: Ask for research goal, level, and available sources.
entries.value: Omba lengo la utafiti, kiwango, na vyanzo vilivyopo.

entries.source: Ask for role, audience, and background; then run a first question.
entries.value: Omba jukumu, hadhira, na usuli; kisha endesha swali la kwanza.

entries.source: Ask for source material and pair type.
entries.value: Omba nyenzo chanzo na aina ya jozi.

entries.source: Ask for source material or topic and target difficulty.
entries.value: Omba nyenzo chanzo au mada na ugumu lengwa.

entries.source: Ask for source material, topic, and target detail if missing.
entries.value: Omba nyenzo chanzo, mada, na undani lengwa ikiwa vinakosekana.

entries.source: Ask for structure, evidence, and clarity feedback while keeping the final draft yours.
entries.value: Omba mrejesho kuhusu muundo, ushahidi, na uwazi huku rasimu ya mwisho ikibaki yako.
